info.name: MY SHOP - Cambodian E-commerce API
info.description:
A production-ready e-commerce API built for the Cambodian market.
Integrates **Bakong KHQR** (National Bank of Cambodia QR payment) and **ABA PayWay**.
Features real-time chat and notifications via Socket.IO (documented separately).

### Authentication
- **User/Admin endpoints**: `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`
- **Public endpoints**: No auth required
- **Admin-only endpoints**: Require `admin` role

  "type": "order_confirmed",
